summary: Verified P0/P1 refactor for LOTTOLAB PRO: tokens moved from localStorage to IndexedDB+RAM (tokenStore.js), backend pytest credentials loaded via .env.test/conftest.py, and vendor Mes Ventes stale-closure fix. All 3 roles login OK, session restores from IndexedDB on reload, logout clears it. Backend pytest test_iteration56_features.py (34/34) and test_iteration48_settlement_engine.py (16 passed, 5 skipped) all green.

minor.issue: PytestReturnNotNoneWarning: test returns a str instead of using assert. Cosmetic only — test passes.

integration_issues.issue: Two transient 'Error fetching profile: AxiosError / net::ERR_FAILED' console errors fire during route change, but the page still renders correctly with stats cards and charts. Likely an in-flight request cancelled during navigation (AbortError surfaced as ERR_FAILED). Worth confirming axios cancellation handling in profile fetch.

issues: React hydration warnings: <span> cannot be child of <tbody>, <tr> cannot be child of <span>. Caused by Emergent visual-editor wrapper spans (data-ve-dynamic) injected inside <tbody>. Pre-existing — not introduced by this refactor.

verification_results.no_localstorage_token_in_target_dirs: PASS — grep over src/api/, src/contexts/, src/services/, src/context/ found ZERO localStorage.(get|set|remove)Item calls with 'token' / 'access_token' / 'lotopam_token' / 'auth_token' keys.
verification_results.super_admin_login: PASS — jefferson@jmstudio.com → /super/dashboard. localStorage token-named keys = []. IndexedDB lottolab_pro.session contains {key:'auth_token'} and {key:'current_session'} records with JWT + user payload.
verification_results.company_admin_login: PASS — admin@lotopam.com → /company/dashboard, stats render (3 Tickets Today, 2.5M HTG Sales, 5 Agents, 193 Open Lotteries). No localStorage token keys.
verification_results.vendor_login: PASS — vendeur@lotopam.com → /vendeur/dashboard, stats + notifications + recent activity render. No localStorage token keys.
verification_results.vendor_mes_ventes: PASS — Navigation via sidebar link works; URL /vendeur/mes-ventes; stats cards (Total Ventes 2,500,000 HTG, Tickets 3, Moyenne 833,333 HTG) + 'Ventes par Jour' bar chart + 'Ventes par Loterie' breakdown all render. No error elements on page (stale-closure refactor confirmed working).
verification_results.session_restore_on_refresh: PASS — After login as super admin, page reload kept user on /super/dashboard (session hydrated from IndexedDB into tokenStore).
verification_results.logout_clears_session: PASS — Clicking Déconnexion redirected to /login; subsequent storage probe showed IndexedDB session store empty (session_records: []) and localStorage still has no token keys.
verification_results.backend_pytest_iteration56: PASS — 34/34 tests passed (TestSuperAdminAuth, TestCompanyAdminAuth, TestSupervisorAuth, TestVendorAuth all green, confirming .env.test is loaded by conftest.py).
verification_results.backend_pytest_iteration48: PASS — 16 passed, 5 skipped (skips are conditional on prior data and not credential-related), 0 failed.

critical_code_review_comments: tokenStore.js: clean implementation with hydrate()/setSession()/clearSession() + subscribe pattern. hydratePromise memoization correctly prevents double-hydration races.
Recommend axios cancellation/AbortController for in-flight profile requests on route change — currently surfaces as 'Failed to load resource: net::ERR_FAILED' noise (cosmetic).

Pre-existing: visual-editor wrapper spans inside <tbody> cause repeated React hydration warnings on super/company dashboards. Unrelated to this refactor but worth cleaning up when touching those pages.
test_iteration48_settlement_engine.py::test_super_admin_login uses `return token` — should use `assert token` to silence PytestReturnNotNoneWarning.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on the requested refactor verification flows

context_for_next_testing_agent: Token storage refactor is fully working — verify by inspecting IndexedDB 'lottolab_pro' database, object store 'session', which holds two records keyed 'auth_token' and 'current_session'. localStorage must NEVER contain a 'token'/'auth_token'/'lotopam_token' key. The legacy 'lotopam_token' localStorage usage was migrated to offlineDB.saveLotoPamToken (LotoPamAuthContext.jsx). Visual-editor hydration warnings about <span>/<tbody> are pre-existing and not caused by this refactor.
